design_decision_log.context: Compact centered layout still allows top-left or center-origin coordinates.
design_decision_log.chosen: use board center as world origin
design_decision_log.rationale: Center origin simplifies camera framing and symmetric tile placement.
alternatives: top-left origin, simpler indexing but less convenient for camera centering

assumptions.assumption: Tiles use equal spacing around the board loop.

review_hints: Check that 28 tile indices remain closed and clockwise.
